title: Gear Aid Revivex Odor Eliminator, for Tents, Footwear and Sports Gear, 2 fl oz
description:
Use Revivex Odor Eliminator to get rid of bad smells, not just mask it. Previously known as Mirazyme, this concentrated blend of water-activated microbes removes the odor. Apply as spray or soak to treat hard to wash items like tents and wetsuits. Or add it to a machine wash to keep gear fresh each season. Use formula within 72 hours of adding water. This gentle formula can be used on a variety of fabrics including neoprene, fleece, spandex, Lycra and cotton. Remove bad odors from all types of outdoor fabrics naturally with Revivex Odor Eliminator.

Gear Aid Revivex Odor Eliminator, for Tents, Footwear and Sports Gear, 2 fl oz

Use Revivex Odor Eliminator to get rid of bad smells, not just mask it. Previously known as Mirazyme, this concentrated blend of water-activated microbes removes the odor. Apply as spray or soak to treat hard to wash items like tents and wetsuits. Or add it to a machine wash to keep gear fresh each season. Use formula within 72 hours of adding water. This gentle formula can be used on a variety of fabrics including neoprene, fleece, spandex, Lycra and cotton. Remove bad odors from all types of outdoor fabrics naturally with Revivex Odor Eliminator.

Key Features

  • All-natural odor eliminator
  • Use the concentrated formula with water-activated enzymes that penetrate fabric pores to remove odor; treat multiple garments with just half an ounce in 20 gallons of water
  • Soak outerwear, tents, athletic clothes, shoes, and pet gear with this gentle solution; also effective on neoprene, nylon, polyester, and GORE-TEX fabrics
  • Spray or soak for hard to wash gear; compatible with washing machines and available in 2 fl oz and 10 fl oz
  • Packaging may vary

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 36132
  • UPC: 137829462297
  • Color: Clear
  • Size: 2 oz
